calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of two Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Petitioner Zhixiong Ou present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for and with the minors Yicheng Ou and Yingting Ettie Ouwith, and with Cantonese Interpreter Charles Zhang, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner Xiuying Pan, but signed the petitioner consenting to the name change of the minors.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Cianna Yicheng Ou and Kimettie Yingting Ou.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
